main.description: A like/dislike vote on a proposed RAQ question.

subject.description: URI of the com.para.raq.proposal being voted on

voteNullifier.description: Privacy-preserving one-person-one-vote nullifier for this RAQ proposal, issued by m8.

eligibilityProofRef.description: Opaque reference to the m8 eligibility/nullifier proof used to cast this vote.
